〜ても / 〜でも: 〜と 言う / 思う など (AI)
Used to quote someone's words, thoughts, or writings. 「〜と 言 っています」 means "is saying that...", 「〜と 思 います」 means "I think that...".
Expresses possibility or conjecture, meaning "maybe", "it might be".
Used to list examples or to mean "etc.", "and others".
Used to list several examples or alternatives, often informally, meaning "things like... and...", "or... or...".
Means "to resemble", "to be similar to".
Means "the same as", "identical to".
Means "when" or "at the time of", used to indicate the time at which something occurs.
Expresses the speaker's desire for someone else to do something, meaning "I want (you/them) to do...".
Used after a counter to indicate the order or sequence of something, meaning "N-th".
Means "aiming for", "heading towards", indicates a goal or direction.
Sets the context or scope in which a statement is made, meaning "in (the context of)", "as for".
